app.name: Free LLM API Keys
app.one_liner: A public repository distributing short-lived, no-registration API keys for 90+ LLM models including GPT-5.4, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, and Grok.

screens.name: Key Listing Screen
screens.purpose: Display available free API keys with model compatibility, budget status, and expiration information.
primary_actions: Refresh to view newly rotated keys
Verify key validity via one-click checker

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist a verified working API key locally for temporary reuse.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add multilingual support based on available README translations
week 1: Implement one-click key verification endpoint integration
week 1: Parse and display rotating API keys from README table
acceptance_tests: System displays last update time and indicates if keys are likely exhausted.
User can copy an API key from the main screen and use it with an OpenAI SDK-compatible tool.
